chapter_title: Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
text:
(a) On filing of the bond and oath required by Section 69.039 (Oath and Bond) , the board shall certify to the governor that a person licensed as a branch pilot has qualified.

(b) On receipt of the board’s certification, the governor shall issue to the person, in the name of the state and under the state seal, a commission to serve as a branch pilot to and from Jefferson and Orange County ports.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 69. Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
##### § 69.037 — Branch Pilot Appointment by Governor

(a) On filing of the bond and oath required by Section 69.039 (Oath and Bond) , the board shall certify to the governor that a person licensed as a branch pilot has qualified.

(b) On receipt of the board’s certification, the governor shall issue to the person, in the name of the state and under the state seal, a commission to serve as a branch pilot to and from Jefferson and Orange County ports.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: On filing of the bond and oath required by Section 69.039 (Oath and Bond) , the board shall certify to the governor that a person licensed as a branch pilot has qualified.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: On receipt of the board’s certification, the governor shall issue to the person, in the name of the state and under the state seal, a commission to serve as a branch pilot to and from Jefferson and Orange County ports.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.
